news.title: Dunleavy signs off on FAST Planning boundary changes
news.description: A three-and-a-half-year dispute over new boundaries between the state of Alaska and the Fairbanks Area Surface Transportation Planning was resolved after Gov. Mike Dunleavy signed off on the changes on Thursday.
